product_description: Pear Deck is an interactive presentation tool designed to transform slides into opportunities for formative assessment and active learning. It enables teachers to create engaging lessons with various question types, facilitating real-time feedback and differentiated instruction for students. The product is part of the Pear Deck Learning ecosystem, which aims to keep students engaged and excelling.

vendor_resources.text: Pear Deck Learning Website Accessibility Statement
vendor_resources.justification: official accessibility statement from Pear Deck Learning

vendor_resources.text: Beyond Compliance: Why GoGuardian and Pear Deck Learning Lead in Digital Accessibility
vendor_resources.justification: vendor blog post discussing their accessibility approach, WCAG 2.1 AA conformance, and VPATs

vendor_resources.text: Building Inclusive Classrooms with Pear Deck and Immersive Reader
vendor_resources.justification: vendor blog post announcing and describing the integration of Microsoft Immersive Reader for accessibility

vendor_resources.text: Pear Assessment's Tools for Inclusive Assessment Accommodations
vendor_resources.justification: vendor blog post detailing universal accommodation features like Text-To-Speech, Immersive Reader, and flexible question types in Pear Assessment

other_resources.text: Nearpod vs Pear Deck: ADA Accessibility Comparison for K-12 Districts (DistrictCheck)
other_resources.justification: third-party article comparing accessibility, specifically mentioning Pear Deck's 2023 VPAT with WCAG 2.1 AA claims.
